title: chenopodium haumanii
intro: Chenopodium haumanii, also known as Huallamochea, is a plant species belonging to the Chenopodiaceae family, commonly found in the Andes mountains of South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chenopodium haumanii include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to treat fever and digestive problems. Chenopodium haumanii is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and infusates, making it a versatile and valuable medicinal plant in traditional Andean medicine.
